info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' vezwa viluRWane ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyA ' (1.34) akarmakaH iti ca  vezwanam - granTanam lowanam - parihARiSca ( pariRAhaSca ( hARam ))' iti kzIrasvAmI  kASakftsnaH DAtumamuM na papAWa

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'svaM hyEva kopAtpfTivImapImAM saM vezwayeH' (BA0 vana0 10264) saMvezwayeH=saMkocayeH
'divaM devendra pfTivIM ca sarvAM saMvezwayestvaM svabalenEva Sakra' (BA0 ASva0 928)

'Sepa iva nirvezwitaH' (ni0 58) anAvfto'saMvfta ityarTaH niHSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati vezwanamAvaraRaM hi DAtorarTastasya viparyAso'nAvaraRam ekEkasminmaRqale muhUrtasya dvO dvAvekazazwiBAgO divasakzetrasya nirvezwayan (=hApayan)
'gopAla iva daRqena yaTA paSugaRAnvane Avezwayata tAM senAM BagadattastaTA muhuH' (BA0 droRa0 2663) Avezwayata arundDa
'CinnA BujAH…udvezwante vicezwante patanti cotpatanti ca' (BA0 karRa 5225) udvezwante ucCritA Bavanti
'mahABujagasaMkASA bAhavaH pariGopamAH udvezwanti vicezwanti saMcezwanti ca sarvaSaH' (BA0 droRa0 8919).. ukto'rTaH
'piRqikodvezwakawyUrupAda ruksadanAni ca' (caraka0 ci0 1614) piRqikodvezwaH piRqikApIqA jaNGApiRqanistodaH
'aTa saMtyajato DarmamaDarmaM cAnutizWataH pratisaMvezwate BUmiragnO carmAhitaM yaTA' (BA0 u0 3429).. pratisaMvezwate saNkucati
prAyeRa BamipatayaH pramadA latASca yatpArSvato Bavati tat parivezwayanti parivezwayanti parikzipanti samAsajanti
'ya imAM pfTavIM kftsnAM carmavat parivezwayet' (BA0 droRa0 1064) parivezwayet saMkocayet samavezwayaditi pAWAntaram
'akto'Byakto vezwityupavezwitI kaYcukyupAnahI pAdukI' (Apa0 1282) kawipradeSo dvitIyena vAsasA vezwito yasya sa upavezwitI
